name: Ollama NVIDIA
short_description: Run large language models locally with NVIDIA GPU acceleration.
description: Ollama is a framework for running large language models (LLMs) locally. This version is optimized for NVIDIA GPUs, providing hardware-accelerated inference for models like Llama 2, Mistral, and other open-source LLMs. Requires NVIDIA Docker runtime and compatible GPU.
usecases: Run local LLMs with GPU acceleration for fast inference
Build AI applications without cloud dependencies
Fine-tune models on your own hardware
notes: Requires NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support
Requires NVIDIA Docker runtime configured on host
Download models on first run (models are large, 4-50GB each)
Substantial GPU VRAM recommended (8GB+ for most models)
